reasoning: Emotional axis (60%): The scroll teleport reads as magical via blue orb center and circular ring motif, and the round form avoids grimness. However the palette is dominated by white/cream and cool blues with only small red-dot accents — the saturated greens, yellows, and pinks expected of a warm friendly Hyrule toy-diorama mood are absent. It feels clinical/arcane rather than charming/bright. Score ~5/10 emotional. Technical axis (40%): Pixel-grid stepping is visible on the ring boundary at all zoom levels indicating intentional hard-pixel work. Tonal shading appears to use ~3 tones on the ring body. However, comparing against Denzi reference (which shows tight 1px hard outlines with zero softness on curved armor silhouettes), the candidate ring curves exhibit transitions that suggest either partial AA or heavy dithering — not the clean staircase pixel-hard edge the criterion demands. Tassel/ribbon detail is undersized and pixelated in a loose way. Score ~6/10 technical. Weighted composite: (5×0.6)+(6×0.4)=5.4 → 5. Marginal: needs warmer/more saturated palette recolour and sharper hard-outline cleanup on the circular boundary before it can pass.
